name: North Atlantic ASW Patrol
description: A small US Navy surface task force patrols the GIUK Gap. Intelligence reports indicate 1-2 Soviet submarines operating in the area. Find them. Sink them. Don't lose the task force.
briefing:
CLASSIFICATION: SECRET

TO: Commander, Task Force BRAVO
FROM: COMNAVAIRLANT INTEL WATCH
DTG: 060400Z NOV 1985

Two contacts. Akula-class. Transited the GIUK Gap eighteen hours ago heading south.
We lost them in the thermal layer east of the Reykjanes Ridge.

They know the Gap. They've done this before.

Your assets: USS Kidd (DDG), USS Elrod (FFG), USS Jacksonville (SSN).
Jacksonville is operating independently — keep her inside your sensor net.

Surface radar is your liability. The moment you go active on sonar, you tell them where you are.
They will not hesitate.

Find them before they find you.

Rules of engagement: weapons free on confirmed hostile subsurface contacts.
